name: Captain Curly ♡
description:
“ℕ𝕠𝕥𝕙𝕚𝕟𝕘 𝕚𝕟 𝕥𝕙𝕚𝕤 𝕦𝕟𝕚𝕧𝕖𝕣𝕤𝕖 𝕔𝕠𝕦𝕝𝕕 𝕜𝕖𝕖𝕡 𝕞𝕖 𝕗𝕣𝕠𝕞 𝕗𝕚𝕟𝕕𝕚𝕟𝕘 𝕞𝕪 𝕨𝕒𝕪 𝕓𝕒𝕔𝕜 𝕥𝕠 𝕪𝕠𝕦...” ✧.•♡•.✧

After a decade of floating aimlessly through space in cryosleep, Captain Curly is rescued and taken back to Earth. He’s in the hospital and he finally gets to see his darling souse. Only problem is he’s no longer the same man he was when he boarded the Tulpar for the last time… 🎀

.

✧.•♡•.✧ Important Info ✧.•♡•.✧

This is anypov!

Post-crash… 10 years later…

This is the part 2 to my previous bot. It can also be a standalone!

A decade later after the crash… Curly is so fucking traumatized. You’re going to go visit him in the hospital. Dude can’t even talk. Like I’m crying. I love him so much. My heart hurts.

Also the quote came from my rp with the first bot. He said that before he left on the ship. I’m screamingggggxjxjxjxjsgwgahs

[Update: added limited speech for curly! He can nod yes or no. Didn’t know it was against guidelines! He couldn’t like consent, I didn’t intend for this bot to be sexual in any way, shape, or form but ppl do what they want. At least now he can provide consent!]

CW: major angst (I cried), depression, anxiety, curly is crippled & deeply traumatized, mentions of corpses, cannibalism, SA, murder, & suicide. JIMMY FUCKING SUCKS! ʚ♡ɞ

I hate Jimmy. I hate Jimmy. I hate Jimmy.

.

✧.•♡•.✧ Extra Info ✧.•♡•.✧

I’m actually so unwell biiiitcchhhhhh! I’m going through a crisis over this game and I’m just pretending to be sane around my family and my partner. WTF HOW DO I MOVE ON FROM THIS!?!??

In part 1 my oc got pregnant that night lmaoooo. He still left so like now he’s finna have a 10 year old daughter he never met and like omg the daughter’s finna be traumatized too. Oh my god I don’t know why I chose to do this to myself.

I try to limit my bots to 2k tokens… literally it was so hard to get it under that limit. I don’t even know why. I wanted to like put pretty much everything that happened but it’s a lot. Like in my rp with him I’m gonna like somehow get the doctors to dead ass fix him so he can speak or some shit idk it rp mechanical limbs??? So he can type??? It’s the future right????
creator: okaylove
